log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a UPX-compressed PE32 executable tagged as a 'spreader' with an overlay. The initial overview shows it's packed and has suspicious behavior. I need to get all IOC types to understand the

The IOC summary shows no network activity (no IPs, domains, or HTTP), but there is 1 registry persistence key and 38 dropped files. The initial overview already showed 1 process created (rmabyb.exe) a

The dropped files reveal a clear pattern: the malware is masquerading as legitimate system files (IO.SYS, MSDOS.SYS, NTDETECT.COM, boot.ini, AUTOEXEC.BAT, CONFIG.SYS) and system directories (Documents

The registry persistence key confirms the malware sets 'ijjmk.exe' to run at startup under a spoofed name 'Microsoft?Windows?Operating System' (using question marks to evade detection). This is a clas
